meta.note: Canned demo pipeline. 13 real SPARK stages replayed from a rebranded JOB0022 run.

stages.label: Intake
stages.description: Parse the client request, open the job card, and lock the run scope.
logs: Job DEMO-0022 opened for Crestfield Foods International
Scope: classic intranet → modern communication site
Source host recorded: contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/ClassicIntranet

stages.label: Verify Access
stages.description: Preflight the source and target tenants before any read or write.
logs: Delegated session verify-contoso.json validated
Source READ scope confirmed · target WRITE scope confirmed
Preflight probe: 5 classic pages reachable — OK

stages.label: Capture Classic
stages.description: Crawl the classic site and snapshot every page, zone, and asset.
logs: Crawled 16 classic pages across 5 hubs
Captured 54 assets · 9 images indexed
Fixed-width tables flagged: 3 pages overflow on mobile

stages.label: Audit
stages.description: Build the content tracker: classify every asset and log pain-points.
logs: 48 content rows classified across Content Tracker
6 pain-points logged: PP-001 Search … PP-006 Social
2 broken links · 4 low-res images flagged

stages.label: Score & Tier
stages.description: Score each page by reach and freshness, then bucket into 3 tiers.
logs: Signals: link graph, recency, content weight
Tier 1: 4 pages · Tier 2: 7 · Tier 3: 5
Homepage pinned Tier 1 — priority score 1.00

stages.label: Notify
stages.description: Post the tiered plan to Teams and ping the operator for the go-ahead.
logs: Handover plan posted to Teams · SPARK channel
Operator gate: build approved for 16 pages
Notification delivered — 0 retries

stages.label: Migrate Images
stages.description: Upload usable images; flag low-res ones for rewrite or SVG swap.
logs: 9 images processed from Image Index
5 migrated as-is · 3 flagged low-res · 1 archived with page
crestfield-logo.png → replace with SVG (72dpi)

stages.label: Compose Pages
stages.description: Rebuild each interior page as modern web-part sections.
logs: Composed 15 interior pages from tracker rows
Zones mapped: hero, news, quick links, document library
APAC Regional Hub · Employee Center · Policy Center · Procurement

stages.label: Compose Homepage
stages.description: Assemble the flagship homepage with hero, news carousel, and nav.
logs: Hero: 'Crestfield Foods International — Global Intranet Portal'
Company News carousel: 3 featured stories
Homepage set as site landing page

stages.label: Style & Brand
stages.description: Apply the Crestfield theme, fonts, and 'Good Food, Every Day' voice.
logs: Brand theme applied · tagline 'Good Food, Every Day'
Brand wallpaper + header customizer applied
Mobile render verified on iOS Safari — no overflow

stages.label: Verify Gate
stages.description: Fail-closed completeness gate: diff composed pages against the source. The agent cannot self-close — the gate decides.
logs: Content-zone diff vs captured source
16/16 pages matched · 0 missing zones · 0 dropped assets
copy fidelity 1.00 — PASS
Gate OPEN: job may proceed to handover

stages.label: Content Tracker
stages.description: Stamp final migration status per row and export the tracker workbook.
logs: Status stamped: 30 Migrate · 9 Rewrite · 5 Review · 4 Archive
Crestfield_Content_Tracker_v1.0.xlsx exported (3 sheets)
Migration Readiness Dashboard refreshed

stages.label: Handover & Closeout
stages.description: Deliver the report, ping the operator, and close the job card.
logs: Handover report delivered to operator
Verdict: copy fidelity 1.00 — gate PASSED
Job DEMO-0022 closed · duration 2h 34m
